comments: Approved. The contract explicitly bounds the implementation to a unified CLI architecture refactor: create bin/team-agents-cowork.js as the command router, update package.json to expose only the single team-agents-cowork binary, and rewrite documentation to use subcommands such as 'npx team-agents-cowork init', 'team-agents-cowork mcp', and 'team-agents-cowork review'. This scope is consistent with the repository's current fragmented state, where package.json still exposes disconnected binaries ('agent-protocol-init', 'team-agents-cowork-init', 'agent-protocol-review', 'agent-protocol-mcp') and the README/install docs still reference legacy commands like 'npx team-agents-cowork-init', 'agent-protocol-mcp', and 'agent-protocol-review'. The out_of_scope clause is also correctly protective: it expressly forbids implementing the Node.js DAG execution runner (V0.9) and forbids active workflow/dispatch.json state semantic changes outside this patch. Allowed files and required outputs are aligned with that narrow refactor boundary and do not authorize broader runtime or workflow-engine changes.
